reasoning: Elon Musk announced the "America Party" in early July 2025 following a public dispute with Donald Trump over a spending bill. By August 2025, reports indicated there had been "little concrete action" toward formally establishing the party, and news coverage of the party effectively ceased in the fall as tensions between Musk and the Republicans reportedly smoothed over. Given the lack of tangible evidence and the October 30 market price of 0.05, it is overwhelmingly likely that this fails the resolution criteria.
